title: About
text:
👋🏻 I am Tsyr-Rau (Hana) Chen, a data-driven business professional with experience in digital marketing, data analysis, project coordination, and business innovation.
My background combines business training from Taiwan, international learning experience in France, and graduate studies in applied business analytics in the United States. This cross-cultural journey has shaped the way I approach problems: I value both structured analysis and creative thinking.
I am especially interested in roles related to marketing, project management, and business/data analytics, where I can connect consumer insights, data interpretation, and strategic execution.

title: About
text:
My Professional Focus


Data-Driven Decision Making
I enjoy using data to understand business problems, identify patterns, and communicate insights in a clear and practical way.


Marketing with Human Insight
My marketing approach combines performance metrics with audience understanding, helping campaigns feel both strategic and relatable.


Global Business Perspective
Through studying and working across Taiwan, France, and the United States, I have developed strong adaptability and cross-cultural communication skills.

title: About
text:
Career Direction
I aim to grow into a professional who can bridge data analytics, marketing strategy, and business execution. In the future, I hope to contribute to organizations that value creativity, data-informed decisions, and meaningful customer engagement.
My long-term goal is to become a well-rounded business professional capable of supporting strategic planning, managing projects, and using analytics to drive measurable impact.

title: About
text:
Beyond Work
Outside of analytics, marketing, and business strategy, I also enjoy exploring creative and meaningful parts of everyday life.


🎵 Music Lover
Music has always been a meaningful part of my life. I play piano, flute, and guitar, and I enjoy how music allows me to express emotions, creativity, and personal stories beyond words.


✈️ Travel & World Explorer
I love traveling and discovering new places, cultures, foods, and lifestyles. One of my personal dreams is to explore every corner of the world that inspires me and collect meaningful memories along the way.


🎥 Life Documentation
I enjoy filming and documenting daily moments, travel memories, and creative life experiences. Through video, I like capturing small but meaningful details that might otherwise be forgotten.
Visit My YouTube Channel


🐰 Cute Things Enthusiast
I love bunnies, cats, dogs, and almost anything cute. Soft, adorable, and heartwarming things always bring positive energy to my day.


🍰 Foodie at Heart
I am a true foodie and enjoy exploring different cuisines, desserts, cafés, bakeries, and beautiful dining experiences. Food is one of my favorite ways to connect with culture and everyday happiness.


📸 Creative Observer
I enjoy observing small details in daily life, whether it is a beautiful street corner, a dessert shop, a travel moment, or a quiet scene that feels meaningful.

title: Projects
text: This page highlights selected projects that demonstrate my skills in business strategy, data analysis, marketing, technology, and innovation.

title: Projects
text:
🍺 Brewery Marketing & Business Strategy
Boston University
Sep 2025 – Dec 2025


Overview
Developed a comprehensive business and marketing strategy for launching a brewery in the Boston area. The project required market research, positioning analysis, operational planning, cost estimation, and promotional strategy design.


Problem
The brewery market in Boston is competitive, with many established local brands. A new brewery must clearly define its target customers, brand personality, competitive advantage, and marketing channels to attract customers and build loyalty.


My Role

Conducted internal and external business analysis.
Contributed to market positioning and customer segmentation.
Developed promotional campaign ideas aligned with sustainability and community engagement.
Helped estimate marketing and operational considerations.
Supported final presentation development.



Tools & Methods

Market research
SWOT analysis
Competitive analysis
Customer segmentation
Marketing strategy design
Business planning



Key Outcome
The final strategy positioned the brewery as a community-oriented and sustainability-conscious brand with targeted promotional campaigns designed to attract young professionals, local residents, and craft beer enthusiasts.

title: Projects
section: 📦 Delivery Time Analysis for Food Delivery Platforms
text:
📦 Delivery Time Analysis for Food Delivery Platforms
Boston University
Sep 2025 – Dec 2025


Overview
Used SQL to analyze delivery time factors for food delivery platforms and identify operational insights that could improve efficiency and customer satisfaction.


Problem
Food delivery platforms must balance speed, service quality, driver availability, restaurant preparation time, and customer expectations. Delays can reduce customer satisfaction and damage platform loyalty.


My Role

Used SQL queries to explore delivery-related data.
Analyzed factors that may influence total delivery time.
Interpreted results from both technical and business perspectives.
Collaborated with teammates to generate recommendations.
Contributed to final reporting and presentation materials.



Tools & Methods

SQL
Data exploration
Data filtering and aggregation
Business interpretation
Team-based analysis



Key Outcome
The project produced practical recommendations for improving delivery operations, including identifying potential bottlenecks and connecting data findings to customer experience improvements.

title: Projects
section: 🤖 Generative AI Food Waste Reduction App
text:
🤖 Generative AI Food Waste Reduction App
National Taipei University
Mar 2025 – May 2025


Overview
Co-developed a mobile app prototype that uses generative AI to help users reduce food waste through personalized suggestions, recipe ideas, and better food management.


Problem
Food waste is a global sustainability issue. Many consumers waste food because they forget what ingredients they have, lack recipe ideas, or do not know how to use leftover items efficiently.


My Role

Co-developed the app concept and user experience.
Used generative AI concepts to design personalized food recommendation features.
Supported prototype development using CursorAI.
Designed a user-friendly interface to improve engagement and usability.
Connected sustainability goals with practical consumer behavior.



Tools & Methods

Generative AI
CursorAI
App prototyping
User experience design
Sustainability-focused innovation



Key Outcome
The prototype demonstrated how AI can be applied to everyday sustainability challenges by helping users make better use of ingredients and reduce avoidable food waste.

title: Projects
text:
🛡️ Anti-Cyberbullying Solution Design
FlyTech Foundation
Jul 2023 – Aug 2024


Overview
Led a team in designing a solution to address cyberbullying through design thinking, user persona development, prototyping, and public presentation.


Problem
Cyberbullying can seriously affect mental health, especially among young users. Effective solutions need to be empathetic, accessible, and based on real user pain points.


My Role

Led the team through the design thinking process.
Developed user personas and identified key pain points.
Participated in prototype design and testing.
Prepared and delivered exhibition presentation.
Engaged with exhibition visitors and communicated the solution clearly.



Tools & Methods

Design thinking
User persona development
Prototyping
Presentation
Team leadership



Key Outcome
The project was presented to more than 100 participants and won the Popularity Award, reflecting strong audience engagement and solution relevance.

title: Projects
text:
🏆 OTOP Marketing Competition
Ministry of Economic Affairs, R.O.C.
Mar 2023 – Oct 2023


Overview
Led a team in developing a marketing strategy for a local specialty product as part of the OTOP Marketing Competition.


Problem
Local specialty products often face challenges in brand differentiation, customer awareness, and storytelling. The goal was to strengthen product positioning and improve market appeal.


My Role

Led team coordination and project planning.
Conducted market research and competitor analysis.
Developed branding and storytelling concepts.
Helped refine campaign direction and presentation structure.



Tools & Methods

Market research
Competitive analysis
Brand positioning
Storytelling
Marketing campaign planning



Key Outcome
The project received the Bronze Award for creative branding, strategic thinking, and effective storytelling.
